languages.original_text: "I am willing to assist you with the identifiers of some of those involved, but Nuncius and I have a condition. Before the samples wind their way into your capable hands, my dearest colleague and I will thoroughly study and comprehend the nature of each of them."

languages.text: "Я готов подсказать вам идентификаторы нескольких заинтересованных лиц, но у нас с Нунциусом есть условие. Перед тем, как образцы попадут в ваши ловкие руки, я досконально исследую и постигну суть каждого из них совместно с моим дражайшим коллегой".

"I am willing to assist you with the identifiers of some of those involved, but Nuncius and I have a condition. Before the samples wind their way into your capable hands, my dearest colleague and I will thoroughly study and comprehend the nature of each of them."

"I am willing to assist you with the identifiers of some of those involved, but Nuncius and I have a condition. Before the samples wind their way into your capable hands, my dearest colleague and I will thoroughly study and comprehend the nature of each of them."

languages.text: «Estoy dispuesto a ayudar con los identificadores de algunos de los involucrados, pero Nuncius y yo tenemos una condición: antes de que los ejemplares lleguen a sus capaces manos, mi querido colega y yo estudiaremos y comprenderemos exhaustivamente cada uno de ellos».
languages.original_text: "I am willing to assist you with the identifiers of some of those involved, but Nuncius and I have a condition. Before the samples wind their way into your capable hands, my dearest colleague and I will thoroughly study and comprehend the nature of each of them."

traits.locale_text: «Estoy dispuesto a ayudar con los identificadores de algunos de los involucrados, pero Nuncius y yo tenemos una condición: antes de que los ejemplares lleguen a sus capaces manos, mi querido colega y yo estudiaremos y comprenderemos exhaustivamente cada uno de ellos».

languages.text: 「関与した者の一部の識別情報について、お手伝いする用意はあります。ですが、ヌンキウスと私には条件があります。標本があなたの有能な手に渡る前に、我が親愛なる同僚と私が、その一つひとつの性質を徹底的に研究し、把握するのです」
languages.original_text: "I am willing to assist you with the identifiers of some of those involved, but Nuncius and I have a condition. Before the samples wind their way into your capable hands, my dearest colleague and I will thoroughly study and comprehend the nature of each of them."

traits.locale_text: 「関与した者の一部の識別情報について、お手伝いする用意はあります。ですが、ヌンキウスと私には条件があります。標本があなたの有能な手に渡る前に、我が親愛なる同僚と私が、その一つひとつの性質を徹底的に研究し、把握するのです」

languages.text: “我愿意协助你核实部分涉事人员的身份，但努恩修斯和我有一个条件。在样本交到你手上前，我和我最亲爱的同僚必须先彻底研究并理解它们的本质。”
languages.original_text: "I am willing to assist you with the identifiers of some of those involved, but Nuncius and I have a condition. Before the samples wind their way into your capable hands, my dearest colleague and I will thoroughly study and comprehend the nature of each of them."

traits.locale_text: “我愿意协助你核实部分涉事人员的身份，但努恩修斯和我有一个条件。在样本交到你手上前，我和我最亲爱的同僚必须先彻底研究并理解它们的本质。”

languages.text: "Ich bin bereit, Euch mit den Identifikatoren einiger der Beteiligten zu helfen, aber Nuncius und ich haben eine Bedingung. Bevor die Proben in Eure kompetenten Hände gelangen, werden sie mein geschätzter Kollege und ich eingehend untersuchen, um ihre Natur zu vergleichen."
languages.original_text: "I am willing to assist you with the identifiers of some of those involved, but Nuncius and I have a condition. Before the samples wind their way into your capable hands, my dearest colleague and I will thoroughly study and comprehend the nature of each of them."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin bereit, Euch mit den Identifikatoren einiger der Beteiligten zu helfen, aber Nuncius und ich haben eine Bedingung. Bevor die Proben in Eure kompetenten Hände gelangen, werden sie mein geschätzter Kollege und ich eingehend untersuchen, um ihre Natur zu vergleichen."

languages.text: « Je suis prêt à vous aider avec les identifiants, mais Nuncius et moi avons une condition. Avant que les échantillons ne vous soient remis, mon cher collègue et moi-même aimerions les étudier de manière approfondie afin de saisir la nature de chacun d'entre eux. »
languages.original_text: "I am willing to assist you with the identifiers of some of those involved, but Nuncius and I have a condition. Before the samples wind their way into your capable hands, my dearest colleague and I will thoroughly study and comprehend the nature of each of them."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis prêt à vous aider avec les identifiants, mais Nuncius et moi avons une condition. Avant que les échantillons ne vous soient remis, mon cher collègue et moi-même aimerions les étudier de manière approfondie afin de saisir la nature de chacun d'entre eux. »

languages.text: "İlgili kişilerin bazılarının kimlik belirleyicileri konusunda size yardımcı olmaya hazırım ama Nuncius ile bir şartım var. Numuneler sizin o yetenekli ellerinize geçmeden önce pek değerli meslektaşım ve ben, onların her birinin doğasını iyice inceleyip anlayacağız."
languages.original_text: "I am willing to assist you with the identifiers of some of those involved, but Nuncius and I have a condition. Before the samples wind their way into your capable hands, my dearest colleague and I will thoroughly study and comprehend the nature of each of them."
